message.content:
{
  "page_type": "other",
  "summary": "This page is a visual guide from a Daikin HVAC manual, showing procedures for viewing historical fault codes and confirming fault codes using a wireless remote. It includes annotated images of control panels and a remote control, with step-by-step instructions in Chinese.",
  "visual_entities": [
    {"type": "control_panel", "label": "Daikin control panel (top section)"},
    {"type": "button", "label": "TEST button"},
    {"type": "display_screen", "label": "Fault code display"},
    {"type": "remote_control", "label": "Wireless remote control (bottom section)"},
    {"type": "indicator_light", "label": "Operation indicator light (green)"},
    {"type": "indicator_light", "label": "Timer indicator light (orange)"},
    {"type": "indicator_light", "label": "Intelligent eye indicator light (green)"},
    {"type": "button", "label": "ON/OFF button"},
    {"type": "text_label", "label": "Normal mode"},
    {"type": "text_label", "label": "Setting mode"},
    {"type": "text_label", "label": "Maintenance mode"},
    {"type": "text_label", "label": "Save 10 historical faults"},
    {"type": "text_label", "label": "Press this key to scroll"},
    {"type": "text_label", "label": "Press TEST key for 4 seconds or more"},
    {"type": "text_label", "label": "Fault occurs, operation light flashes"}
  ],
  "visual_relationships": [
    {"from": "Normal mode", "relation": "transitions to", "to": "Setting mode"},
    {"from": "Setting mode", "relation": "transitions to", "to": "Maintenance mode"},
    {"from": "TEST button", "relation": "used to transition from", "to": "Normal mode"},
    {"from": "TEST button", "relation": "used to transition from", "to": "Setting mode"},
    {"from": "Fault code display", "relation": "shows", "to": "Fault code"},
    {"from": "Operation indicator light", "relation": "flashes when", "to": "Fault occurs"},
    {"from": "Wireless remote control", "relation": "has", "to": "ON/OFF button"},
    {"from": "Wireless remote control", "relation": "has", "to": "Indicator lights"}
  ],
  "useful_for_knowledge_types": ["fault_diagnosis", "maintenance_procedures", "user_interface"],
  "ocr_text_if_useful": "查看历史故障代码\n保存10次历史故障\n按此键翻看\n正常模式\n按TEST键4秒以上\n设定模式\n按TEST键4秒以上\n维修模式\nDAIKIN SERVICE CENTER OF SHANGHAI\n2.2使用无线遥控器确认故障代码\n2.2.1 家用机\n2.2.1.1风灵/EMAX/多联机\nFTX25/35L\nFTX56A\nFTXD56/68C\nFTXD25/35/60/71D\nCDXD FDXD\n指示灯\n开/关按钮\n定时器指示灯(橙)\n运转指示灯(绿)\n智能眼指示灯(绿)\n出现故障时运转灯闪烁",
  "uncertainty_notes": "The exact model numbers listed (e.g., FTX25/35L) are partially obscured by a checkered pattern, but the text is legible. The relationship between the remote control and specific model compatibility is implied by the diagram but not explicitly stated in a visible relationship.",
  "confidence": 0.9
}

parsed.summary: This page is a visual guide from a Daikin HVAC manual, showing procedures for viewing historical fault codes and confirming fault codes using a wireless remote. It includes annotated images of control panels and a remote control, with step-by-step instructions in Chinese.

visual_entities.label: Press TEST key for 4 seconds or more

parsed.ocr_text_if_useful:
查看历史故障代码
保存10次历史故障
按此键翻看
正常模式
按TEST键4秒以上
设定模式
按TEST键4秒以上
维修模式
DAIKIN SERVICE CENTER OF SHANGHAI
2.2使用无线遥控器确认故障代码
2.2.1 家用机
2.2.1.1风灵/EMAX/多联机
FTX25/35L
FTX56A
FTXD56/68C
FTXD25/35/60/71D
CDXD FDXD
指示灯
开/关按钮
定时器指示灯(橙)
运转指示灯(绿)
智能眼指示灯(绿)
出现故障时运转灯闪烁

The relationship between the remote control and specific model compatibility is implied by the diagram but not explicitly stated in a visible relationship.
